title: senna wislizeni var. pringlei
intro: Senna wislizeni var. pringlei, also known as Pringle's desert senna, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anthraquinone glycosides that have a laxative effect. The health benefits of Senna wislizeni var. pringlei include promoting bowel movements, relieving constipation, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, capsules, and tinctures that can be used to support digestive well-being.
